title: Only thing that does not need your attention.
summary: The best agent you'll use this year won't ask for your attention.

title: Everyone's building agents. Most never leave the hangar.
summary: Six live instruments for reading where AI agents actually stand right now — not the pitch deck version. Every dial below is calibrated to a real 2026 dataset.

title: You stop giving steps. You start giving outcomes.
summary: -Make sure I'm prepared for tomorrow is not an instruction — it's a target. Click it and watch what an outcome-owning agent decides to do with it.

title: The Swarm Architecture
summary: Moving past single 'God Models' toward specialized multi-agent networks that collaborate on zero-copy data layers.

title: Zero-Copy Data Access
summary: Why future software won't import your databases—agents will query system data in-place without moving a single byte.

title: Your AI agent will remember you.
summary: The question nobody's marketing slide asks: remember you correctly?.
